## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of the change and the problem it solves. -->

## How was it tested?

- [ ] `./build.sh` compiles clean (zero warnings) and the app launches
- [ ] Toggled on/off and verified `pmset -g | grep SleepDisabled` follows the switch
- [ ] (If touching the grant/scripts) `./uninstall.sh` still proves revocation

**macOS version tested:** <!-- e.g. 26.5 -->
**Mac model:** <!-- e.g. Mac17,7 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No personal paths/usernames added to scripts, the sudoers template, or install commands
- [ ] No new third-party dependencies, helper daemons, or kexts
- [ ] Docs/translations updated if behavior or install steps changed
- [ ] I agree my contribution is licensed under the MIT License
